creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Adam Weinberger from comment #9)

It's linked from within 'Policies' at <https://www.freebsd.org/portmgr/>, although I never thought of pkg-status.freebsd.org as a policy resource. 

Also, it's under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/committers-guide/#ports-qa-misc-correctly-building>, although people who are not committers would not think to browse this guide.
